summary: Completed iteration 17 testing: New subscription model UI integration. All features verified. Fixed 2 bugs: missing imports in CareRequestsProvider.jsx and App.js routing for /planes redirect.
passed_tests: GET /api/subscription/plans returns single active plan at $9,990 (Suscripción U-CAN)
Dashboard (client): SubscriptionCard visible with price $9.990/mes and 'Suscribirme Ahora' button
Provider Dashboard: SubscriptionCard with provider-specific benefits ('¡Accede a más clientes!')
Chat: Non-subscribed users see 'Mensajería Bloqueada' page with SubscriptionCard CTA
Provider Profile: Non-subscribed users see blocked contact with SubscriptionCard
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: CareRequestsProvider.jsx missing imports (Filter from lucide-react, Link from react-router-dom)
Fixed: App.js routing /planes to PlansSimple instead of Plans (redirect component)
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/App.js (changed /planes route from PlansSimple to Plans for redirect)

success_rate.backend: 100% (26/26 tests passed - 16 from iteration_16, 10 from iteration_17)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified the new symmetric subscription model at $9,990/mes. Key changes: 1) /planes now redirects to /dashboard (subscription handled within dashboards). 2) SubscriptionCard.jsx is a reusable component for subscription CTA. 3) Chat shows 'Mensajería Bloqueada' page for non-subscribed users. 4) Provider profiles show SubscriptionCard in blocked contact section. 5) CareRequestsProvider shows partial data to non-subscribed providers.
